items.definition_en: An espresso machine is a device used to brew espresso coffee.
items.example_en: He learned to make coffee with an espresso machine.

items.definition_en: A food dehydrator is an appliance that removes water from food.
items.example_en: She made dried fruits with her food dehydrator.

items.definition_en: A wine cooler is a small refrigerator used for chilling wine.
items.example_en: They stored their bottles in a wine cooler.

items.definition_en: A popcorn maker is a machine for popping corn kernels.
items.example_en: We used the popcorn maker for movie night.

items.definition_en: An ice maker is a device that produces ice cubes automatically.
items.example_en: They filled the drinks with ice from the ice maker.

items.definition_en: An induction cooktop is a stove that uses electromagnetism to heat cookware.
items.example_en: The induction cooktop heats pans quickly.

items.definition_en: A stand mixer is a stationary electric mixer for mixing ingredients.
items.example_en: She made bread dough in her stand mixer.

items.definition_en: A hot plate is a small portable stove with one or two burners.
items.example_en: Students often use a hot plate in their dorm room.

items.definition_en: A water dispenser provides chilled or hot water instantly.
items.example_en: The office kitchen has a water dispenser.

items.definition_en: An air fryer cooks food by blowing hot air around it.
items.example_en: He made fries in his air fryer.

items.definition_en: A warming drawer keeps cooked food warm until served.
items.example_en: She put the rolls in the warming drawer during dinner.

items.definition_en: An electric skillet is a frying pan powered by electricity.
items.example_en: He cooked pancakes on the electric skillet.

items.definition_en: A pressure cooker is a sealed pot that cooks food quickly using steam pressure.
items.example_en: Beans cook much faster in a pressure cooker.

items.definition_en: A range hood is a device above the stove that removes smoke and steam.
items.example_en: She turned on the range hood while frying fish.

items.definition_en: A combination oven can cook with both steam and convection heat.
items.example_en: The new combination oven saves time in the kitchen.

items.definition_en: A sous vide machine precisely cooks food in water at a controlled temperature.
items.example_en: They use a sous vide machine for perfect steaks.

items.definition_en: An electric griddle is a flat cooking appliance for frying foods.
items.example_en: He makes breakfast on the electric griddle.

items.definition_en: A bean grinder is used for grinding coffee beans or other beans.
items.example_en: She uses a bean grinder every morning for fresh coffee.

items.definition_en: A yogurt maker is an appliance for making yogurt at home.
items.example_en: Her homemade yogurt is delicious thanks to the yogurt maker.

items.definition_en: A rotisserie oven cooks meat by slowly turning it on a spit.
items.example_en: He roasted a chicken in a rotisserie oven.
